hooks.command: cd '/Volumes/BriteBrain/Projects/Harness Agent' && TNAME="${TOOL_NAME:-}" && case "$TNAME" in Agent|Workflow|WebFetch|WebSearch) W=3 ;; Write|mcp__*) W=2 ;; *) W=1 ;; esac && cur=$(grep "^LOOP_WEIGHT:" .sessions/session_tokens.md 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $2}') && new=$(( ${cur:-0} + W )) && sed -i '' "s/^LOOP_WEIGHT:.*/LOOP_WEIGHT: $new/" .sessions/session_tokens.md 2>/dev/null || true
